programmes.show_description: The Biggest Ballads from the royals of rock! From Queen, Bon Jovi & Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Nickleback & Evanescence.
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Starting in 2006 - 30 minutes of the biggest rock songs from Fall Out Boy!
Turn it up to 11 all Easter weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro, Sum 41, Kings Of Leon & The Foo Fighters.
20 years of feel good rock tracks! From Blink-182 & Bon Jovi at the start 00s to Panic! At The Disco & Pink at the end of the 2010s.
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
Turn up your speakers to 11 and live life even louder! Emo Anthems in order from Linkin Park in 2000 to The My Chemical Romance at the end of the Decade!
Your Easter weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
Standby to pay homage to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced! From Grace Slick and Christine McVie to Ozzy Osbourne and Jimi Hendrix.
Turn it up to 11 all Easter weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro, Sum 41, Kings Of Leon & The Foo Fighters.
Let your hair down as Claire Sturgess has a wild ride of fabulous follicles and awesome rock hairdos! From Bowie's glamorous transformations to Joe Elliot's indestructible mullet.
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
In order, an hour of every song a number 1 rock song in the noughties!
In order, 20 of the biggest american anthems from the 21st Century featuring The Killers, Bon Jovi, Nickleback and One Republic.
Nothing but Anthems from USA! From AC/DC, Guns N Roses & Bon Jovi to Aerosmith, Green Day & Blondie.
A musical journey through sixty years of the finest American rock n' roll. From Elvis & Jerry Lee Lewis to Nirvana & Green Day.
Your Easter weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
T'Pau's Carol Decker is back again with a countdown of '80s guys who liked to rock! With John Parr, Billy Idol, Guns N' Roses and ZZ Top.
These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!
An hour of rockin' chart toppers from the 80s featuring big hits from Blondie, Berlin, Pink Floyd & U2!
He's sung and played bass with many over the years, but fame came as one of the original Sex Pistols in 1976. Currently with Blondie, Glen picks his 25 punk & new wave favourites.
Your Easter weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
The most fabulous glam rock icons from the satin & glitter of 70s through to the bold new look of today. Glam Rock never left us, it just changed outfits!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
25 of the greatest rock bands of the noughties featuring Paramore, Bullet For My Valentine, Slipknot and My Chemical Romance.
Turn it up to 11 all Easter weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro, Sum 41, Kings Of Leon & The Foo Fighters.
Mark Goodier with a countdown of bands and artists who've had one rock song that has been viewed over a billion times since the 00s.
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
25 All-Killer 00s Dumbass Anthems! From Blink-182 and Wheatus to Fall Out Boy and Scouting For Girls.
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
Carol Decker from T'Pau with 50 Rock Ballads written from the Heart and Soul! With Queen, Bon Jovi, Cutting Crew and Bonnie Tyler.
